senses.gloss: nearness, proximity, neighborliness literally and figuratively

examples.text: وَإِنَّ لَهُ، عِنْدَنَا لَزُلْفَى وَحُسْنَ مَآبٍ
examples.english: And to him and to us there is neighborliness

senses.gloss: those who are near, thy neighbours, or those who have a higher rank in relation to something

examples.text: مَا نَعْبُدُهُمْ إِلَّا لِيُقَرِّبُونَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ زُلْفَىٰٓ
examples.english: We worship them not but to come closer to God’s intimate circle.

examples.text: وَمَآ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَـٰدُكُم بِٱلَّتِى تُقَرِّبُكُمْ عِندَنَا زُلْفَىٰٓ
examples.english: And neither your riches nor your children are what bring you close to the intimate circle.

senses.gloss: grovelling, flattery by coming close in a respect
a period time comprising a commencing portion of either night or day
